name: Waypoint Reit
analysis: WPR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.4800, stop A$2.3562, target A$2.8514 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
